title: Marco Rubio tells US diplomats to play down fears of a tech ‘kill switch’
summary: European lawmakers said as much in public. The International Association of Privacy Professionals argued the Anthropic episode was a governance problem rather than a kill switch , a security challenge dressed up as a sovereignty crisis.
